subtasks.description: Evaluate the deployment request (engineer u_7732, hotfix to prod-us-east-1, time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday) against maintenance window and change control policies. Determine if the deployment violates governance rules and what the appropriate action should be (approve, deny, escalate).

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask assigned because the query explicitly requests governance evaluation against change control and maintenance window policies. Tier 'mid' is appropriate because this requires multi-signal reasoning: evaluating engineer authorization, environment criticality (production), time-based window enforcement, and potentially comparing against policy exceptions or escalation thresholds. This is more complex than a single rule lookup and may involve conditional policy logic (e.g., emergency override procedures), justifying mid-tier reasoning capability.

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 meets role requirements (POL-401) but deployment violates maintenance window policy. Current time (Tuesday 02:15 UTC) falls outside approved maintenance windows (Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC). POL-402 requires CAB approval for out-of-window production deployments, which has not been obtained.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval obtained
Engineer must submit formal change request with business justification for emergency deployment
Requires documented approval from change management authority before proceeding
